calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-23-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:09am
Judge Pro Tem Steven Kipperman, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants, Gordon Bowman-Jones and Christina Bowman-Jones, appear in pro per. Respondent Robert Sheppard appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Kipperman.

Previous exhibits returned to Appellant.

EXHR (1) Multi page packet beginning with client questionaire.
EXHR (2) 2 stapled packets of copies of emails.
EXHA (A) Multi page document outlining their claim.

9:44am

Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.
